programme.title: Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking three contestants to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000

programme.title: Tipping Point: Best Ever Finals
programme.desc: More of the most thrilling and nerve-racking endgames from the arcade-themed quiz show hosted by Ben Shephard, in which the last contestant standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Poland v Slovakia (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the opening fixture in Group E, which takes place at Saint Petersburg Stadium. Poland only made their debut at the European Championship in 2008, but they have appeared in both subsequent tournaments and reached the quarter-finals of Euro 2016 in France, losing in a penalty shootout to eventual champions Portugal, and with Robert Lewandowski still leading the line, they will be confident of providing a stern test for anyone. Slovakia are playing in their second consecutive European Championship and qualified via the play-offs, defeating Republic of Ireland and then Northern Ireland to reach this stage. Their captain - Napoli legend Marek Hamsik - is now almost 34, and may see this as his final opportunity to perform on the biggest stage. Presented by Mark Pougatch, with Eni Aluko, Nigel de Jong and Ally McCoist, and commentary by Sam Matterface and Lee Dixon

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: During the latest trip to the ever troubled region of the Dales, Aaron finds Liv, Bernice is determined and Meena covers her tracks with David

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Having spent the night in the ginnel, Nina staggers home, lying to Roy about where she has been. Aled's consultant confirms he is an ideal candidate for a cochlear implant operation, while a troubled Mary tells Bernie what she heard Dev saying to Steve. When Evelyn calls to pick up the girls, she's gobsmacked by Tyrone's new look, and Billy gets a call from Summer's school

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal introduces the key moments from the Group D match between Scotland and Czech Republic at Hampden Park. Emma Hayes and Scott Brown provide the expert analysis. Plus, updates from the home nations as England and Wales both reflect on their first matches. With commentary by Sam Matterface, Seb Hutchinson and Tom Gayle

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: As the murder evidence begins to build, Harper and the team are met with conflicting accounts. Meanwhile, Elizabeth finds herself taunted by one of the suspects and the trouble around the Kamara deal, forcing her to choose between her personal and professional loyalties. As the chief superintendent is deserted by her allies, she enters a dangerous game of cat and mouse. Crime thriller, starring Sarah Parish, David Avery and Charlotte Hope

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords. The last remaining duo have the opportunity to win the money they've banked earlier in the show to potentially double their winnings, or leaving with nothing

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: More celebrity interviews and topical debate from a female perspective

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the opening three races of the festival, which take place at 2.30, 3.05 and 3.40. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Rishi Persad, Matt Chapman, Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, race commentary by Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson, lifestyle with Mark Heyes and Charlotte Hawkins, and social stable from Oli Bell and Chris Hughes

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Hungary v Portugal (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the opening match in Group F, as Cristiano Ronaldo and the current holders get their title defence under way at Puskas Arena in Budapest. Both teams will see victory here as vital to their chances, with this group also containing Germany and world champions France. These sides shared a six-goal thriller during Euro 2016, with Ronaldo and Balazs Dzsudzsak both scoring twice in a 3-3 draw during the group stage. That result meant Portugal sneaked through to the last 16 having drawn all three of their matches, but they made the most of their opportunity and went all the way, defeating hosts France in the final to lift the trophy for the first time. That tournament was Hungary's first appearance since 1972, and they qualified once again via the play-offs in late 2020, overcoming Bulgaria and Iceland to book their place at the finals. Seema Jaswal is joined by Gary Neville, Nigel de Jong and Eni Aluko for live coverage, with commentary from

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: France v Germany (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the mouthwatering Group F fixture, which takes place at Fußball Arena München. This final match in the opening round of group games is arguably the most eagerly anticipated, with current world champions Les Bleus taking on Die Mannschaft, the side they replaced as World Cup victors. Both teams will want to lay down a marker here to show their potential to the other nations, especially group rivals and defending European champions Portugal, although expectations of a strong German campaign are more muted this year than in the past. Coach Joachim Low will step down at the end of the tournament and a dismal 2018 World Cup, a 6-0 loss to Spain and defeat at home to North Macedonia have damaged confidence, and being drawn alongside France, Portugal and Hungary has hardly helped matters. Their last meeting in this competition came in the 2016 semi-final, when two goals from Antoine Griezmann sealed a 2-0 victory for France at the Stade

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. Airside officer Ian has a close shave out on the runway. Meanwhile, veteran Border Force officers Glen and Amarjit hunt down smuggled cargo

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Free from the restrictions of her position, Elizabeth is determined to bring the true murderer to some form of justice. Armed with information to solve the case, she heads straight into the heart of the viper's nest. In a disturbing confrontation, she is forced to face her own demons. Crime thriller, starring Sarah Parish, David Avery and Charlotte Hope

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Italy v Switzerland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the second Group A fixture for both sides, which takes place at Stadio Olimpico in Rome. These near neighbours haven't played each other since June 2010, and this is their first-ever meeting at the European Championship finals. Switzerland's last victory over the Azzurri came back in May 1993, when Roy Hodgson masterminded a 1-0 World Cup qualifying victory in Berne thanks to Marc Hottiger's second-half goal. It's fair to say that the Swiss have been drawn a difficult hand in this tournament, beginning their campaign against Wales in Azerbaijan, before travelling to Rome for this match, and then returning to Baku for their final group fixture against Turkey. Italy are coached by former Manchester City boss Roberto Mancini, who has used a number of players from lesser-known clubs to make his side one of the form outfits in world football. Roy Keane, Patrick Vieira and Gary Neville provide the expert analysis, and

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Poland v Slovakia (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the opening fixture in Group E, which takes place at Saint Petersburg Stadium. Poland only made their debut at the European Championship in 2008, but they have appeared in both subsequent tournaments and reached the quarter-finals of Euro 2016 in France, losing in a penalty shootout to eventual champions Portugal, and with Robert Lewandowski still leading the line, they will be confident of providing a stern test for anyone. Slovakia are playing in their second consecutive European Championship and qualified via the play-offs, defeating Republic of Ireland and then Northern Ireland to reach this stage. Their captain - Napoli legend Marek Hamsik - is now almost 34, and may see this as his final opportunity to perform on the biggest stage. Presented by Mark Pougatch, with Eni Aluko, Nigel de Jong and Ally McCoist, and commentary by Sam Matterface and Lee Dixon

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Hungary v Portugal (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the opening match in Group F, as Cristiano Ronaldo and the current holders get their title defence under way at Puskas Arena in Budapest. Both teams will see victory here as vital to their chances, with this group also containing Germany and world champions France. These sides shared a six-goal thriller during Euro 2016, with Ronaldo and Balazs Dzsudzsak both scoring twice in a 3-3 draw during the group stage. That result meant Portugal sneaked through to the last 16 having drawn all three of their matches, but they made the most of their opportunity and went all the way, defeating hosts France in the final to lift the trophy for the first time. That tournament was Hungary's first appearance since 1972, and they qualified once again via the play-offs in late 2020, overcoming Bulgaria and Iceland to book their place at the finals. Seema Jaswal is joined by Gary Neville, Nigel de Jong and Eni Aluko for live coverage, with commentary from

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: France v Germany (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the mouthwatering Group F fixture, which takes place at Fußball Arena München. This final match in the opening round of group games is arguably the most eagerly anticipated, with current world champions Les Bleus taking on Die Mannschaft, the side they replaced as World Cup victors. Both teams will want to lay down a marker here to show their potential to the other nations, especially group rivals and defending European champions Portugal, although expectations of a strong German campaign are more muted this year than in the past. Coach Joachim Low will step down at the end of the tournament and a dismal 2018 World Cup, a 6-0 loss to Spain and defeat at home to North Macedonia have damaged confidence, and being drawn alongside France, Portugal and Hungary has hardly helped matters. Their last meeting in this competition came in the 2016 semi-final, when two goals from Antoine Griezmann sealed a 2-0 victory for France at the Stade

programme.desc: A woman released from prison finds herself in danger from her former cellmate, who Nick believes may also have a connection with a post-office robbery. Jenny Agutter and Clare Higgins guest star, with Nick Berry and Derek Fowlds

programme.desc: Liam reveals the reason for abducting Chris, Alice tells Kathy of the wonderful weekend she spent with Elsa while Eric persuades Ashley to let him turn the village hall into a gym

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: A letter arrives at the Woolpack for Zoe from Chris's kidnapper. Kathy's attempts to fight dirty backfire and the Dingles plot their revenge on Eric for trying to wreck the wedding

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly accuses Spider of going behind his back with Lorraine. Sally is jealous at the thought of Greg with Maxine, and Rita apologises to Alec for turning down his proposal

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita is annoyed when Alec tells Ken that they are an item. Lorraine arranges to go dancing with Spider but Toyah invites herself along, and Greg lies to Sally about his whereabouts

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy needs a partner for the annual staff dance, so Robin takes lessons from Mrs Roper. Flat-sharing comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Paula Wilcox and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth falls victim to depression after failing to prevent the murder of a society girl by notorious art thief Marrascaud. His confidence shattered, Poirot eventually returns to work when a lonely chauffeur begs him to find his missing soulmate, the maid of a famous Russian dancer. The investigation takes him to the Swiss Alps, where, against all odds, he stumbles upon a hotel thought to be Marrascaud's hideout - leading to a very personal showdown. The penultimate episode of the long-running detective drama, starring David Suchet, with Simon Callow, Orla Brady, Patrick Ryecart, Nigel Lindsay, Morven Christie, Tom Austen and Rupert Evans

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: First episode of the costume drama set in an Edwardian country house in 1912, written by Oscar-winning writer Julian Fellowes. The lives of the Crawley family and Downton Abbey's servants are changed for ever when the sinking of the Titanic leaves the estate without its heir and his son. The arrival of a new valet shocks the staff, who scheme to make his stay as short-lived as possible. Starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The inspector and his sidekick DS Hathaway investigate the murder of a talented maths student. The prime suspect is the victim's ex-boyfriend, who is convinced his uncle has set him up, but old case papers belonging to Morse reveal the boy's family is hiding a dark secret. Laurence Fox and Rebecca Front co-star alongside Kevin Whately

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When an RAF officer is found hanged in a wood, Meredith - the new chief superintendent at Hastings - is quick to dismiss it as a straightforward suicide. However, an aerial photo of a German village found in the dead man's pocket leads Milner to suspect murder. The newly retired Foyle is compelled to return to service when events take an even more unexpected turn. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: In 1838, at the age of 18, young princess Alexandrina's life is transformed when she ascends the throne of Great Britain and becomes Queen Victoria. As monarch in her own right, the young Victoria suddenly finds herself freed of the repressive shackles placed on her by her mother's advisor, Conroy, and builds a new alliance with the charismatic prime minister Lord Melbourne. However, her inexperience makes her susceptible to mistakes - and ultimately scandal. Period drama, starring Jenna Coleman

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: As Lord Melbourne's popularity in the house wanes, the Tories eagerly await their imminent triumph, while the Duke of Cumberland views it as a chance to prey on his niece's vulnerability and establish a co-regency with the Duchess of Kent and Conroy. Victoria is devastated when Melbourne regretfully announces he is stepping down and even more bewildered that she must ask complete stranger Sir Robert Peel to form a government, and she desperately implores Melbourne to return. Period drama, starring Jenna Colman and Rufus Sewell

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Maggie, George and Ventress all become victims of poison pen letters, but when Nick investigates, it appears not everyone is admitting to receiving them

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Everything seems to be going to plan for Liam until Zoe demands proof that her brother is alive. Elsa confronts Kathy about her attitude

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Turner tells Elsa and Kathy they must put Alice first. Jack argues with Sarah over the boys helping out on the farm, and Mandy's spending spree sends Kelly into a fit of jealousy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally does not know how to tell Kevin she has changed her mind about the garage. Curly receives an unwanted letter from Raquel, and Rita panics when she cannot catch her breath

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec insists to Rita that she sees a doctor. Spider and Lorraine decide to throw a party while Emily's away, and Audrey enjoys Fred's attention and goes to dinner with him

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of archaeology student Celia Dawe and the significance of matching playing cards lead Wycliffe on a manhunt across Cornwall. Police drama based on the novel by WJ Burley, guest starring Bill Nighy alongside Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: David Suchet takes on his final case as the Belgian sleuth in the last-ever episode of the long-running drama. Crippled with arthritis, Poirot is now using a wheelchair and has a life-threatening heart condition, but remains as sharp as ever. Calling on old friend Captain Hastings for assistance, he returns to Styles, where the pair first met 30 years earlier on a murder investigation. The detective is convinced the country house is once again harbouring a killer, and as guests fall victim to a mysterious attacker, he must summon the last of his strength to battle his ultimate nemesis. With Hugh Fraser, Anne Reid, Philip Glenister, Helen Baxendale, Matthew McNulty, Anna Madeley and Shaun Dingwall

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Everyone is anxious at the arrival of Matthew Crawley, the heir presumptive, but he soon encounters problems settling into his new life in Downton, and his mother Isobel immediately crosses swords with Violet. Meanwhile, butler Carson is mortified to be confronted with his past, and housemaid Gwen seems to have a secret correspondent. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville, Dan Stevens, Penelope Wilton, Elizabeth McGovern, Jim Carter and Rose Leslie

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are called away from a team-building exercise to investigate a fatal explosion at a haulage yard in Calham Cross. The property is owned by Territorial Army commanding officer Matt Parkes, the father of a businessman whose ruthlessness in the boardroom is matched only by his behaviour toward women. To complicate matters, the village is also home to a peace protester and a grieving mother - and Barnaby has to decide if any of these locals is capable of arson and murder. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with Tim Pigott-Smith, Joseph Millson, Niamh Cusack, Judy Parfitt and Nick Fletcher

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When an unpopular employee at a military psychiatric hospital is found murdered, there is no shortage of suspects, but a colleague of the man, an exiled Polish Jew, holds himself responsible for the death. Foyle is convinced there is another explanation, but his priorities shift when news of a missing boy from London reaches Hastings. Starring Michael Kitchen, Phyllida Law and Nicholas Woodeson

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: King Leopold suggests to Victoria that she consider Prince Albert as a possible consort, a development that results in the young queen being surrounded by suitors seeking her hand in marriage, The young queen remains determined to rule alone, a declaration that leaves her uncle suspicious about her relationship with Melbourne

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Prince Albert arrives in England for the first time, and he and Victoria take an instant dislike to each other in an awkward first encounter. However, their disdain quickly passes and an attraction grows between them, to Melbourne's dismay. Below stairs, Albert's valet clashes with the royal servants, while Skerrett is visited by a girl in need of money

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick goes undercover to track down an escaped prisoner, Greengrass discovers a couple of naturists, and Auntie Eileen has a decision to make when she meets a face from her past. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry, Bill Maynard and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Ashley and Bernice have their work cut out on the camping trip. Kelly and Roy share their first breakfast in the cottage, and Liam tries to coax Zoe out for a drink

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Elsa is set to return to Australia but tells Kathy she will not give up on the custody claims, and Ashley wakes up next to Bernice on the camping trip

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Kabin is ransacked after Rita leaves the keys in the lock. Alf warns Fred to keep away from Audrey, and Curly decides to dramatically change his image

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin does not understand why Sally has changed her mind. Toyah is thrilled when her letter is printed in Just 16 magazine, and Mike discovers Hayley's secret

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of an amateur flautist and the disappearance of a maid on a secluded country estate soon have Detective Superintendent Charles Wycliffe unravelling a mystery involving family feuds and illicit relationships. Police drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Bentham DeQuetteville falls to his death from a roof after seeing a headless horseman, his aristocratic family seem more concerned about their forthcoming Civil War re-enactment than the incident. As Barnaby and Jones try to discover the truth behind the ghostly figure, their investigation uncovers shocking secrets about the DeQuettevilles. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with James Callis, William Gaunt and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Cora's attempts at matchmaking are dashed when Mary is smitten not by intended target Evelyn Napier, but by his handsome friend, Turkish attache Kemal Pamuk. The couple's mutual attraction sparks a train of events whose consequences ripple through the entire household. Gwen is humiliated as her secret ambition is exposed, and Bates takes extreme action to cure his limp. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Michelle Dockery, Brendan Patricks, Theo James, Rose Leslie and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Mystery drama set in Bath, where the wildly ambitious DCI McDonald finds herself paired with the shy, modest DS Dodds, who has languished on the shelf for most of his working life. However, it soon turns out the unassuming sergeant has a hidden talent for puzzle solving. Their first case sees the pair looking into the shooting of a homeless man in the deserted mansion of local industrialist Max Crockett. The Crockett appear to be a close-knit group but it soon becomes clear they have secrets to hide. Jason Watkins and Tala Gouveia star as the detectives, with a guest appearance from Robert Lindsay

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle is enlisted as the police representative on the Victory Day Celebrations Committee, alongside his old friend John Kiefer representing the American forces stationed at Hastings. But a murder of one of their number puts paid to the preparations when evidence points to the guilt of another member, and investigations uncover truths the Allies would rather remain hidden. Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks star, with guest Jay Benedict

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Melbourne warns Victoria that Parliament will not be happy about her marrying a German prince, a prediction that proves all too accurate when the Privy Council refuse to grant Albert a royal title. The prince fears for his future in England, while Victoria succumbs to paranoia, becoming convinced that he only intends to marry her for the financial independence he will gain

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Albert feels he needs a greater role in public affairs, and becomes involved in the anti-slavery movement. Victoria matches wills with the Duke of Sussex to see that her husband is granted more respect, while Skerrett faces a dilemma when she realises that the only person who can save her cousin and child from certain death is the man she trusts the least

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Mollie Sugden as a hired-help who finds her long-lost son

programme.desc: Nicola was unaware it was Jimmy's plea hearing today. Kim's suspicions return, and Jamie is hurt

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Hayley is nervous when she starts work at Underworld. Alec is upset that Rita refuses to talk to him. Greg runs back into Maxine's arms when Sally cannot meet up with him

programme.desc: Zoe is a nervous wreck as she prepares to confront her brother's kidnapper, while Paddy's secret honeymoon plans are disrupted when the police demand Mandy's passport

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick discovers an act of courage can have sinister consequences after he rescues a woman from a house fire. Meanwhile, Greengrass sets himself up as a birdwatcher's retreat. Rural police drama, starring Nick Berry, Bill Maynard and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: That's My Boy

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's god-daughter Lydia and her son James - who is severely traumatised by a bombing at his school - come to stay unexpectedly. Struggling to look after the lad when his mother goes missing, Foyle's life suffers a further complication when the body of a local man is found near a military centre - leading him into the top-secret world of weapons research. Kate Fleetwood and Michael Jayston guest star, with Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.desc: Ashley and Bernice have their work cut out on the camping trip. Kelly and Roy share their first breakfast in the cottage, and Liam tries to coax Zoe out for a drink

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Elsa is set to return to Australia but tells Kathy she will not give up on the custody claims, and Ashley wakes up next to Bernice on the camping trip

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The Kabin is ransacked after Rita leaves the keys in the lock. Alf warns Fred to keep away from Audrey, and Curly decides to dramatically change his image

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin does not understand why Sally has changed her mind. Toyah is thrilled when her letter is printed in Just 16 magazine, and Mike discovers Hayley's secret

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of an amateur flautist and the disappearance of a maid on a secluded country estate soon have Detective Superintendent Charles Wycliffe unravelling a mystery involving family feuds and illicit relationships. Police drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Bentham DeQuetteville falls to his death from a roof after seeing a headless horseman, his aristocratic family seem more concerned about their forthcoming Civil War re-enactment than the incident. As Barnaby and Jones try to discover the truth behind the ghostly figure, their investigation uncovers shocking secrets about the DeQuettevilles. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with James Callis, William Gaunt and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Cora's attempts at matchmaking are dashed when Mary is smitten not by intended target Evelyn Napier, but by his handsome friend, Turkish attache Kemal Pamuk. The couple's mutual attraction sparks a train of events whose consequences ripple through the entire household. Gwen is humiliated as her secret ambition is exposed, and Bates takes extreme action to cure his limp. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Michelle Dockery, Brendan Patricks, Theo James, Rose Leslie and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Mystery drama set in Bath, where the wildly ambitious DCI McDonald finds herself paired with the shy, modest DS Dodds, who has languished on the shelf for most of his working life. However, it soon turns out the unassuming sergeant has a hidden talent for puzzle solving. Their first case sees the pair looking into the shooting of a homeless man in the deserted mansion of local industrialist Max Crockett. The Crockett appear to be a close-knit group but it soon becomes clear they have secrets to hide. Jason Watkins and Tala Gouveia star as the detectives, with a guest appearance from Robert Lindsay

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle is enlisted as the police representative on the Victory Day Celebrations Committee, alongside his old friend John Kiefer representing the American forces stationed at Hastings. But a murder of one of their number puts paid to the preparations when evidence points to the guilt of another member, and investigations uncover truths the Allies would rather remain hidden. Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks star, with guest Jay Benedict

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Melbourne warns Victoria that Parliament will not be happy about her marrying a German prince, a prediction that proves all too accurate when the Privy Council refuse to grant Albert a royal title. The prince fears for his future in England, while Victoria succumbs to paranoia, becoming convinced that he only intends to marry her for the financial independence he will gain

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Albert feels he needs a greater role in public affairs, and becomes involved in the anti-slavery movement. Victoria matches wills with the Duke of Sussex to see that her husband is granted more respect, while Skerrett faces a dilemma when she realises that the only person who can save her cousin and child from certain death is the man she trusts the least

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Comedy, starring Mollie Sugden as a hired-help who finds her long-lost son

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the stories behind supposedly deadly freshwater creatures, beginning by examining whether piranhas deserve their fearsome reputation. He travels to Brazil to swim in the Amazon with the fish and incites them into a feeding frenzy, before tracking down survivors and eyewitnesses of attacks

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Enemy agents use a fiendish device to transfer their minds into the bodies of Steed and Mrs Peel - whose subsequent strange behaviour makes them a threat to national security. Freddie Jones and Patricia Haines guest star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's sanity is questioned when he becomes preoccupied with a gang of Hell's Angels and puts his life in jeopardy by taking part in a motorbike race to the death. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is assigned to mind a writer of romantic fiction with a drink problem, whose ex-husband has sold their house behind her back. Beryl Reid and Bill Maynard guest star, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The team learns of an attempt to steal a top-secret file, and investigates the involvement of a distinguished lord. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt and Stuart Damon

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the foothills of the Himalayas to investigate stories of deadly attacks by the man-eating goonch catfish, tracking down the species to establish if its methods of killing are as gruesome as reports suggest

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of damning reports claims police officers are not playing by the book, so Regan poses as an ex-con and heads to a club frequented by two officers suspected of running a protection racket and taking bribes from villains to release them. John Thaw stars

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The brother of the late Clement Armstrong devises a plan to avenge his death at the hands of the cybernauts by setting a deadly trap for Steed and Emma. Peter Cushing guest stars

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An amnesiac woman delivers a garbled message about an attack on a diplomatic meeting planned for the following day. She later regains her memory and tells Bodie and Doyle her employers were abducted by the same gunmen who intend to carry out the action. Gordon Jackson, Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur excludes Terry from his latest business venture, prompting him to embark on a search for alternative employment. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Though it is later proved he got a legitimate loan and is innocent of theft, the youngster finds himself being blackmailed after falling foul of some very dangerous individuals. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Coronation Street's Hayley Tamaddon, football star Geoff Hurst, comedian Rob Beckett and presenter Gaby Roslin pit their wits against ruthless quiz geniuses in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: Cameras focus on life at Leeds Bradford airport during the summer of 2018. It may not be the UK's biggest, but what it lacks in size, it makes up for in ambition. With owners having green-lit a multi-million pound investment, the airport is undergoing a huge makeover. There are also problems for the staff due to an emergency landing after a plane's cockpit warning alarm shows its door is still open. Meanwhile, terminal manager Nathan has to deal with a blocked international arrivals door. Hugh Dennis narrates

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: The airline auditors pay a surprise visit to Leeds Bradford airport, which leaves baggage boys Jimmy and Michael in fear for their jobs when they manage to lose a piece of luggage. Duty manager Nathan has to deal with a flood in the toilets next to an executive departure lounge, and new recruit Gabby faces a trial by fire at the Departure Gate. She has to tell the members of an irate family that they will not be sitting together on their flight to Palma, and struggles to control the ensuing confrontation

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Having previously toured their own countries, Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix now hit the highways of of the States - although in the first episode, they are in Mexico, on a mission to taste the world's best breakfast. Along the way, the trio take part in a chili-eating competition, have a beach buggy race and watch some traditional Mexican wrestling - but it isn't long before they are persuaded to take part

programme.title: Jack Reacher (2012)
programme.desc: A former army sniper is arrested following a random shooting that leaves five people dead, but protests his innocence. An elusive former military police investigator is called in to examine the case, and becomes convinced a conspiracy is at work. Action thriller based on Lee Child's series of novels, starring Tom Cruise, Rosamund Pike, Werner Herzog and Robert Duvall

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Jack Reacher (2012)
programme.desc: A former army sniper is arrested following a random shooting that leaves five people dead, but protests his innocence. An elusive former military police investigator is called in to examine the case, and becomes convinced a conspiracy is at work. Action thriller based on Lee Child's series of novels, starring Tom Cruise, Rosamund Pike, Werner Herzog and Robert Duvall

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: Part one of two. Manager Harry Redknapp and his assistant John Barnes take charge of a squad of former footballers whose waistlines have expanded since they hung up their boots as they try to get back in shape and back on the pitch to take on a German team. David Seaman, Robbie Fowler, Mark Wright, Matt Le Tissier, Chris Waddle, Rob Lee, Ray Parlour, Lee Sharpe, Mark Chamberlain, Paul Merson and Neil Ruddock are plunged into a new training and healthy eating regimen akin to that of modern professional footballers

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry has to protect a Russian writer who has recently been smuggled into Britain

programme.title: ITV4 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The team learns of an attempt to steal a top-secret file, and investigates the involvement of a distinguished lord. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt and Stuart Damon

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The brother of the late Clement Armstrong devises a plan to avenge his death at the hands of the cybernauts by setting a deadly trap for Steed and Emma. Peter Cushing guest stars

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell, Francesca Cumani, Matt Chapman and Adele Mulrennan look ahead to the opening day of Royal Ascot

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal introduces the key moments from the Group D match between Scotland and Czech Republic at Hampden Park. Emma Hayes and Scott Brown provide the expert analysis. Plus, updates from the home nations as England and Wales both reflect on their first matches. With commentary by Sam Matterface, Seb Hutchinson and Tom Gayle

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The trio race against time to find a World War Two bomb in a bid to stop it falling into the hands of a neo-Nazi group keen to launch another battle. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: America boasts a species of fish reputed to have committed a number of violent attacks on humans. The alligator gar is said to be as vicious as a shark and as large as an alligator. Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas on a hunt to uncover the truth about the notorious creature

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. The hitherto innocent son manages to play-off his parent's ex-cohorts against one another with increasing dexterity and appears only too keen to pick up the duplicitous traits of his late father. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel infiltrate an international conference at which the delegates have begun acting strangely - by predicting their own deaths. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with Clifford Evans, William Lucas and Allan Cuthbertson

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the final four races on the opening day, where the 4.20 St James's Palace Stakes is the feature, and races also take place at 5.00, 5.35 and 6.10. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Rishi Persad, Matt Chapman, Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, race commentary from Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson, lifestyle with Mark Heyes and Charlotte Hawkins, and social stable from Oli Bell and Chris Hughes

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits the Alaskan wilderness in search of the Iliamna Lake monster of native legend that is said to drag people down to an icy grave. Subarctic fishing is a first for the extreme angler, who secures his largest catch to date as he pursues the mysterious creature

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as DJ Scott Mills, actress Sunetra Sarker, boxer Anthony Ogogo and TV presenter Johnny Ball pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third round of the season from the Misano World Circuit Marco Simoncelli, where Britain's Jonathan Rea was looking to extend his lead at the top of the standings

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay aims to show his companions that US food lives up to its reputation of being bigger and better as they travel from Nevada to Los Angeles. They begin in style with a helicopter ride about the Grand Canyon - although Gino is too nervous to appreciate the spectacle below him. Next up is a trout fishing trip contest in the Colorado River, followed by a burger in Las Vegas with a hefty price tag of $777 and a visit to a ranch where they have to round up herds of cattle on horseback. Finally, they hit Los Angeles, where they have a barbecue battle

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: Part two of two. Harry flies the players and their wives off to Spain for a supposedly alcohol-free warm-weather training camp, but plans go awry almost immediately as Robbie Fowler gets in trouble for going out and failing to turn up for training the next morning. With only weeks to go, training ramps up, but injuries are taking their toll and Harry is worried that his players aren't losing enough weight. The big day arrives and the team are playing Germany for one final time in front of an expectant crowd - but have they done enough to pull the England shirt back on for one last shot at glory?

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: The squad members find themselves on high alert after an apparent threat is made on Riggs' life. With Murtaugh taking on more responsibility at work, he and his threatened partner have to deal with their changing relationship. Meanwhile, Trish gets caught up in some trouble, and Molly implores Riggs to make a big decision about their future. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: An old college friend of Harry's attempts to set him up, on the orders of an underworld boss

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The trio race against time to find a World War Two bomb in a bid to stop it falling into the hands of a neo-Nazi group keen to launch another battle. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel infiltrate an international conference at which the delegates have begun acting strangely - by predicting their own deaths. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with Clifford Evans, William Lucas and Allan Cuthbertson

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell, Francesca Cumani, Matt Chapman and Adele Mulrennan look ahead to the second day of Royal Ascot

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur excludes Terry from his latest business venture, prompting him to embark on a search for alternative employment. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates allegations that the Loch Ness monster not only exists, but is also responsible for a mysterious spate of killings in Scotland. Fulton Mackay guest stars alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A houseguest wakes up in dilapidated Wisteria Lodge to find that his host and all the household servants have vanished. Understandably perplexed, he heads straight for Baker Street and asks Holmes to solve the mystery of their disappearance. Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke star

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The death of a ventriloquist leads to the discovery that he was carrying a collection of gems in his stomach. Meanwhile, Steed resorts to blackmail and Emma embarks on a mission in the business community

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: An ex-footballer persuades Arthur to buy 2,000 tickets for an England v Scotland football match. However, trouble ensues once it becomes apparent they are forgeries. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the concluding race on the second day of the festival - the 6.10 Kensington Palace Stakes, plus a round-up of all the day's racing. With commentary by Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at memorable stagings of the race from Epsom Downs. Featuring brilliant performances from Shergar to Sea The Stars, plus interviews with personalities from the worlds of sport and entertainment

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as rugby player Shane Williams, Coronation Street's Sair Khan, comedian Milton Jones and former Paralympic athlete Tanni Grey-Thompson pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: King of the Roads
programme.desc: The Spring Cup. Action from the event at Oliver's Mount Circuit in Scarborough. After it was cancelled in 2020 due to the pandemic, this year it opens the road racing calendar

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix head to San Francisco, the free-spirited capital of the United States. They start out by sampling the latest trends of using cannabis in cooking, which was legalised in California in 2018 - but as they enjoy a hippy afternoon tea, Gino overindulges and chaos ensues, especially when the next activity on the agenda is a session of goat yoga. Moving on, the trio dig for clams on the Pacific coast, take a hot-air ride to a vineyard and visit a factory in Chinatown where fortune cookies are made. It seems a competition is in order and so the travel companions see who can make the most cookies in 60 seconds

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: FBI agent Sean Archer captures terrorist Castor Troy, the man who killed his son. While Troy is in a coma, Archer has the crook's face surgically grafted onto his own so he can go undercover and locate a bomb planted somewhere in Los Angeles. But then Troy regains consciousness - and in turn takes on Archer's identity. John Woo's action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Travolta, Joan Allen, Gina Gershon and Dominique Swain

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: The latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The brother of the late Clement Armstrong devises a plan to avenge his death at the hands of the cybernauts by setting a deadly trap for Steed and Emma. Peter Cushing guest stars

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli Bell, Francesca Cumani, Matt Chapman and Adele Mulrennan look ahead to the opening day of Royal Ascot

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Seema Jaswal introduces the key moments from the Group D match between Scotland and Czech Republic at Hampden Park. Emma Hayes and Scott Brown provide the expert analysis. Plus, updates from the home nations as England and Wales both reflect on their first matches. With commentary by Sam Matterface, Seb Hutchinson and Tom Gayle

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: The trio race against time to find a World War Two bomb in a bid to stop it falling into the hands of a neo-Nazi group keen to launch another battle. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: America boasts a species of fish reputed to have committed a number of violent attacks on humans. The alligator gar is said to be as vicious as a shark and as large as an alligator. Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade heads to Texas on a hunt to uncover the truth about the notorious creature

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan gets caught in the crossfire between the family of a recently deceased gangland leader and the members of the late man's crime syndicate, regarding the division of the hoodlum's wealth. The hitherto innocent son manages to play-off his parent's ex-cohorts against one another with increasing dexterity and appears only too keen to pick up the duplicitous traits of his late father. Hywel Bennett guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a legendary racehorse's disappearance is solved with the help of one of the most famous clues in the Holmes canon - 'the curious incident of the dog in the night-time'. Victorian detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel infiltrate an international conference at which the delegates have begun acting strangely - by predicting their own deaths. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with Clifford Evans, William Lucas and Allan Cuthbertson

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani present coverage of the final four races on the opening day, where the 4.20 St James's Palace Stakes is the feature, and races also take place at 5.00, 5.35 and 6.10. With analysis from Jason Weaver and Kevin Blake, reports by Rishi Persad, Matt Chapman, Luke Harvey and Adele Mulrennan, race commentary from Richard Hoiles and Mark Johnson, lifestyle with Mark Heyes and Charlotte Hawkins, and social stable from Oli Bell and Chris Hughes

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits the Alaskan wilderness in search of the Iliamna Lake monster of native legend that is said to drag people down to an icy grave. Subarctic fishing is a first for the extreme angler, who secures his largest catch to date as he pursues the mysterious creature

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as DJ Scott Mills, actress Sunetra Sarker, boxer Anthony Ogogo and TV presenter Johnny Ball pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third round of the season from the Misano World Circuit Marco Simoncelli, where Britain's Jonathan Rea was looking to extend his lead at the top of the standings

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay aims to show his companions that US food lives up to its reputation of being bigger and better as they travel from Nevada to Los Angeles. They begin in style with a helicopter ride about the Grand Canyon - although Gino is too nervous to appreciate the spectacle below him. Next up is a trout fishing trip contest in the Colorado River, followed by a burger in Las Vegas with a hefty price tag of $777 and a visit to a ranch where they have to round up herds of cattle on horseback. Finally, they hit Los Angeles, where they have a barbecue battle

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: Part two of two. Harry flies the players and their wives off to Spain for a supposedly alcohol-free warm-weather training camp, but plans go awry almost immediately as Robbie Fowler gets in trouble for going out and failing to turn up for training the next morning. With only weeks to go, training ramps up, but injuries are taking their toll and Harry is worried that his players aren't losing enough weight. The big day arrives and the team are playing Germany for one final time in front of an expectant crowd - but have they done enough to pull the England shirt back on for one last shot at glory?

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: The squad members find themselves on high alert after an apparent threat is made on Riggs' life. With Murtaugh taking on more responsibility at work, he and his threatened partner have to deal with their changing relationship. Meanwhile, Trish gets caught up in some trouble, and Molly implores Riggs to make a big decision about their future. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.title: Gordon, Gino and Fred: American Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay, Gino D'Acampo and Fred Sirieix head to San Francisco, the free-spirited capital of the United States. They start out by sampling the latest trends of using cannabis in cooking, which was legalised in California in 2018 - but as they enjoy a hippy afternoon tea, Gino overindulges and chaos ensues, especially when the next activity on the agenda is a session of goat yoga. Moving on, the trio dig for clams on the Pacific coast, take a hot-air ride to a vineyard and visit a factory in Chinatown where fortune cookies are made. programme.desc: FBI agent Sean Archer captures terrorist Castor Troy, the man who killed his son. programme.desc: Sam and Diane decide to get married, but have very different ideas over what sort of engagement ring to buy. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris - and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, though, he begins to regret his impulsiveness. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.desc: Jasmine Harman is on the Greek island of Crete, showing five properties to childhood sweethearts Catherine and Patrick from Leeds. They've been married for over 20 years and cannot wait to enjoy extended holidays in Crete in a property which can also accommodate their two teenage sons. Jasmine shows them five properties for their £150,000 budget

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Sussex, the first hosts are childhood sweethearts Robin and Maria. Robin is the brains behind the cooking, but it's up to Maria to ensure the hosting is spot on. Sasha and Leslie are next, and Sasha soon reveals her apparent royal 'connection'. On the last night, Karl and Michael think they are in with a chance of nabbing the £1,000 prize, so long as they can keep their bickering at bay

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Trio of scary short stories. Homer is left battling against killer mutants in the ruins of a devastated Springfield. An accident with a matter-transportation device causes Bart to switch bodies with a housefly, and in colonial times Marge is accused of witchcraft

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Liberty makes a shocking discovery. Meanwhile, a jealous Grace confronts Martine after she flirts with Felix, and Juliet gets the wrong end of the stick

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt reports from Argentina on the price of sunflower seeds. Amanda Byram is in Yorkshire's rhubarb triangle, where she investigates how forced rhubarb can grow in complete darkness. Plus, Andi Oliver reveals how much added sugar goes into takeaway milkshakes

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla help two busy doctors from Manchester with three children, coming up with a menu that will please everyone and reduce waste. Recipes include a simple chicken and cauliflower traybake, rice pudding that makes use of leftover rice, and a hack that turns an old bag of salad into a mouth-watering salsa verde

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. A five-year-old girl is brought into the paediatric department with a large splinter lodged in her bottom, and a patient has a lump on her shoulder that has developed since having a fall five weeks ago

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary going on the frontline with police in South Yorkshire, revealing what happens when people decide to take revenge on each other. On a Saturday night in Sheffield, police respond when a man reports that he's being attacked by his partner after she found him with a prostitute. A woman is under siege from a neighbour who claims he is sorting out neighbourhood problems by smashing cars with a hammer. And on the outskirts of Doncaster, there's a brawl outside a supermarket as three men attack someone they suspect of causing their family harm

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics help a drunk driver who has crashed on a duel carriageway but find themselves on the receiving end of a vicious attack. In Bromsgrove, a paramedic's ambulance comes under siege as they try to attend to another drunk member of the public

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willy's Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, drama producers Henry and Tom are first to host with a traditional British menu. The second dinner party, hosted by design-loving Vinnie and Tanz, sees three types of lamb, while the hosts for the final evening are Shahab and Asia, who try to impress their foodie guests with a globally inspired menu that divides opinion. Whose soiree will secure the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs take part in chocolate week. First they must combine chocolate and one of Benoit Blin's favourite ingredients, without any recipes to hand. Then the chefs are challenged to create mechanical chocolate showpieces, along with 48 bon bons that include a moving part, inspired by robots

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces

In south London, he meets a woman converting a 1980s campervan into a mobile canine holiday home, and in New Zealand he travels to a remote lodge made almost entirely of glass. He also looks for inspiration on how to put a garden inside his rotating home

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A mother of eight children swaps lives with a gay millennial father of two, who believes that traditional ways of raising children are not always the best

programme.desc: The tourists are off to Odemira, in southern Portugal, for some river kayaking and a chocolate-making workshop

programme.title: Jamie's Comfort Food Bites

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition in Edinburgh are young lovebirds Andy and Pim, who are hoping to impress their guests with a Scottish and Thai-themed menu - with a bit of American thrown in for good measure. On the second night, the group learns more about Jimmy and Jas's fairy-tale first encounter, as well as Jimmy's fledgling modelling career, which surprises everyone. Night three sees a bromance between Andy and Stuart blossom, and everyone needs an open mind when they sample plumber Stuart and hairdresser Jack's experimental menu

After that judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden ask them to take the humble fruit crumble and transform it into a fine-dining showpiece, complete with towering, edible sculptures. Presented by Tom Allen and Liam Charles

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: On the frontline with the South Yorkshire police as they deal with an increasing numbers of non-emergency cases. A man reports an assault in progress, but when police arrive they find him in a drunk and drugged state and hoping for a lift home. What surprises them most, however, is when he asks them to go pick up his cannabis stash first. In Sheffield city centre, officers help a confused elderly woman suffering from dementia who cannot find her way home

programme.desc: A final romp through the Naked Attraction archive, remembering the times that the pickers got it spot on and chose their perfect date, leading to romance and happy endings. programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The seven remaining contenders spend 48 hours undergoing the most psychologically gruelling stage of the training, designed to test their ability to resist interrogation. The recruits are hooded and exposed to endless white noise, and face brutal tactical questioning from a specialist team, while those who endure this experience face an even greater challenge on the highest point on the island

But years later, with two young sons of their own, Shekhar and Shaila's relationship is threatened by inter-religious rioting in the city. Indian drama, starring Arvind Swami and Manisha Koirala. In Tamil

programme.desc: Robert bumps into his ex-wife, and considers rekindling the relationship. Meanwhile, Frank tells Amy the story of how the pair split up in the first place

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the family's Roman holiday continues, Robert falls in love with sultry local beauty Stefania (Alex Meneses), who works in an ice-cream shop

programme.title: Frasier

Niles throws a fancy-dress Halloween party with a literary theme as a benefit for the Library Association, which he attends dressed as Cyrano de Bergerac, while a misunderstanding lets one or two skeletons out of the closet. Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roz panics at the thought of becoming a mother, prompting Frasier to lend her a friendly shoulder to cry on - while he ponders the father's identity. Award-winning comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Special episode filmed on location in Seattle. Frasier is guest of honour at a public rally to mark his 1,000th radio show - but the celebrations go awry as Niles's jealousy reaches new peaks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Nigel tackles dated windows and Debbie creates her first mural as the duo set to work transforming a room in a rundown conservatory into a bright new garden room

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: Charlie and Patrick try to do deals on a pair of Michael Jackson autographs and a limited edition turntable, while two luxury pens and a gold pocket watch could help save a dog home from closure. Elsewhere, Dan and assistant Shelwa are befuddled by a 3D printer and are faced with a watch which may help pay for some university fees

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Rufus Hound is in Dictionary Corner as Nick Hewer hosts the game show where contestants pit their wits against each other in a battle of words and numbers

programme.title: The Answer Trap
programme.desc: Married couple Alex and Katie from Loughborough take on stepmother and stepdaughter Annette and Leanne from London, hoping to steer clear of the traps and play for £10,000. Quiz, hosted by Anita Rani

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tamsin is looking for her dream holiday home on the Greek island of Crete. She and her best friend Emma, who she has known since meeting at nursery school, have enjoyed many a holiday on the island, and now Tamsin is ready to have her own bolthole there. Laura Hamilton works within her budget of £100,000 to find a suitable property

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glasgow pair Jean and Ron hope their 'taste of Scotland' menu will impress their guests. Day two sees Colin and Craig try to claw back the limelight and jolly up the mood

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Ned Flanders resigns as coach of Springfield's junior football team, so Homer takes his place - and tries to make up for his own childhood shortcomings on the sports field by giving Bart the role of star quarterback. Featuring the guest voices of Joe Namath and Mike Judge

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Damon finds a goodbye letter from Liberty and believes she has left him, and James unintentionally gives Sally a plan to convince the police she is guilty

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of the best, most memorable offers they have made. Claire and Matt are looking for a quirky old home with open-plan living and are not afraid of a project, while Sadie and Simon have sold their home so they need a new place pronto - but bungalows in Bath are not easy to find. Rich and Bethan have missed out on two properties in 12 months, and their desire for chocolate box perfection is stronger than ever

programme.title: Before We Die
programme.desc: Bianca realises the truth about Stefan and makes Christian a proposition. Traumatised by what he has done, and hopelessly tangled up in the undercover police investigation, Christian opts instead to take a trip with Davor that will reveal everything he needs to know about the planned operation. Crime thriller, starring Lesley Sharp and Patrick Gibson

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and criminologist Professor David Wilson investigate famous unsolved murder cases, continuing with the disappearance of Suzy Lamplugh. The estate agent vanished after making an appointment with a client in July 1986. Despite the high profile of the case, nobody has ever been charged with Lamplugh's abduction and murder. Following a series of tantalising clues, Emilia and David narrow the field of suspects down to just one man. Will he reveal the truth?

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, more than half a million Eritreans have fled their home in eastern Africa, escaping one of the most repressive and secretive dictatorships in the world. Reporting in Eritrea is almost impossible but for more than five years, Evan Williams has been gathering secretly shot footage from inside the country and interviewing some of those who have escaped. Here he documents allegations of torture, arbitrary detention and indefinite forced conscription into military service

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five people to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. As the volunteers enter the last week of the experiment, Michael explores how alterations to eating patterns and exercise can do wonders for stress levels. He helps the group members explore their inner motivation before they tackle the final fitness challenge. He also reveals to them how far they've come in 21 days - with some astonishing results

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete to throw the best dinner party in the West Midlands. Image-conscious couple Sarah and Jack kick off the competition with a clean-living menu. Their guests think the food is a little too healthy, but the entertainment breaks the ice as everyone lets loose at the silent disco. On day two, foodies Liz and Martin cook an Italian feast from scratch, inspired by recipes from Liz's Italian mother. Finally Carl and Sonya serve up a pub-inspired menu and a huge surprise

programme.title: I Origins (2014)
programme.desc: A biologist researching the evolution of eyes uncovers shocking evidence that suggests people are reincarnations of the dead - a fact that could have far-reaching consequences for the human race. Drama, starring Michael Pitt, Brit Marling and Archie Panjabi

programme.title: We Are Lady Parts
programme.desc: After their unsuccessful audition, Saira takes Amina to Wasim's poetry night to help her get over her stage fright. Meanwhile, Momtaz, Bisma and Ayesha aren't convinced that Amina is the key to the band's success, so enlist journalist and influencer Zarina to help propel Lady Parts into the spotlight. Comedy, starring Anjana Vasan, Juliette Motamed, Lucie Shorthouse and Sarah Kameela Impey

programme.title: Wife Swap USA

programme.title: Inside Tesco: 24/7
programme.desc: Documentary series charting the story of Britain's biggest retailer, from its origins on a market stall to the supermarket giant it has become today. As well as looking back to the store's humble beginnings, the series also goes behind the scenes in some of Tesco's 3,627 stores as the company opens its doors to TV cameras for the first time in two decades. The first episode charts the birth of Jack Cohen's brand on an East End market stall in London in 1919, and looks at how it expanded in the decades to come

programme.title: Summer on the Farm
programme.desc: Helen Skelton and Jules Hudson host a week of live programmes from the Nicholson family's farm Cannon Hall Farm in south Yorkshire. programme.desc: Seven experts in fine art are assembled into a military platoon during the Second World War, and given an unusual mission.
